acquisition method: Here, LC-MS/MS phosphoprotein analysis revealed that IRBIT controls five NBCe1-B phosphorylation sites
enrichment method: phospho-peptide enrichment using either Fe-NTA or TiO2 columns
fragmentation method: mass spectrometry (Orbitrap Fusion ETD mass spectrometer, ThermoFisher)
instrument: mass spectrometry (Orbitrap Fusion ETD mass spectrometer, ThermoFisher)
reduction reagent: reduced by addition of 20 mM dithiothreitol
